title: Add file permission checks at startup
description: At startup, check that config.toml and broadside.db are not world-readable (mode & 0o077 == 0). Warn if they are. This catches the common deployment mistake of leaving default permissions.
close_reason: Cargo audit: rsa/instant accepted as known risk. Fuzz: ammonia panic fixed, 3 fuzz targets created. Ops: file permission warning at startup, quality gates in CLAUDE.md, signing error sanitized in last_error.
